scenarios.name: A "Normal" priority ticket breaches SLA after 5 business days untouched
scenarios.logs: SLA scanner processed 1248 tickets in 2.1 s

scenarios.name: Comments reset the inactivity clock
scenarios.errorMessage: expected unflagged, got flagged — clock-reset logic ignored comments older than 24 h
scenarios.note: Threshold bug — comments within 24 h reset the clock, older ones should still count. Filed BUG-2041.
